scripts.build:deps: npm --prefix ../../sdk-ts install --include=dev && npm --prefix ../../sdk-ts run build && npm --prefix ../../qmdb/ts install --include=dev && npm --prefix ../../qmdb/ts run build:wasm && npm --prefix ../../sql/ts install --include=dev && npm --prefix ../../sql/ts run build && npm --prefix ../../simplex/ts install --include=dev && npm --prefix ../../simplex/ts run build
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && tsc -b && vite build
